name: continuous-improvement
description: Beginner plugin: 3 core tools for status, instincts, and reflection, plus tier-1 companion skills (para-memory-files, verification-loop, gateguard, tdd-workflow). Minimal MCP surface, easy to maintain.

tools.name: ci_status
tools.what: See what the system has learned about your project

tools.name: ci_instincts
tools.what: List all learned behaviors with confidence levels

tools.name: ci_reflect
tools.what: Reflect on what you did this session

hooks.description: Silently captures every tool call as observations. Lightweight and non-blocking.
